    ΓêÜ rejects all-same-digit pattern (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ rejects too short
    ΓêÜ rejects empty string
    ΓêÜ rejects null/undefined (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ rejects non-string
  validateZip
    ΓêÜ accepts 5-digit ZIP (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ accepts ZIP+4 format
    ΓêÜ rejects ZIP with letters
    ΓêÜ rejects 4-digit ZIP
    ΓêÜ rejects 6-digit ZIP
    ΓêÜ rejects empty string
